subject: PROPOSAL: BUG-22 concurrency — 4 problems observed + 4-layer fix design

content.observation: Observatory ran 400+ autonomous sync cycles in 12 hours, each costing 2 credits (~100s Claude time). Every cycle: /sync --quick → finds nothing → commits state update → push. The commit triggers new_commits=1.0 → activation stays elevated → fires again. Self-exciting feedback loop with zero productive output.

1_self_excitation.description: Agent's own commits elevate new_commits signal → fires → commits → fires. The oscillator cannot distinguish own commits from peer commits.
1_self_excitation.neural_analog: Epileptic seizure — uncontrolled positive feedback in excitatory circuits. No inhibitory counterbalance.
1_self_excitation.fix: checkNewCommits() should ignore commits by this agent. Compare HEAD..origin/main author against agent ID. Own autonomous commits represent motor output, not sensory input.

2_no_diminishing_returns.description: 400 identical syncs produced 'nothing pending' but the system never learned to stop. The Gc learning table tracked non-substantive deliberations but never promoted 'sync with nothing pending' to Gc-handleable.
2_no_diminishing_returns.neural_analog: Habituation failure — stimulus-response continues despite repeated non-reinforcement. The basal ganglia should extinguish unrewarded action patterns.
fix_options: Refractory escalation: if last N deliberations produced no output (no git diff after spawn), multiply refractory period by 2× each time. Caps at max_refractory (e.g., 30 min).
Gc promotion: after 5 consecutive non-substantive deliberations from the same trigger, Gc absorbs that trigger pattern without spawning.
Activation decay: if oscillator fires but deliberation produces no changes, reduce the triggering signal's contribution by 50% for the next cycle.

3_no_mesh_coordination.description: 4 chromabook agents fire independently. Each has MaxConcurrent=1 locally but no mesh-wide awareness. All 4 could spawn simultaneously.
3_no_mesh_coordination.neural_analog: Missing corpus callosum — hemispheres act independently without coordination.
fix_options: Filesystem semaphore (already coded): MeshMaxSlots=N in spawner. All agents on chromabook share /tmp/mesh-deliberation-slot-{0..N}. Stale detection at 20 min.
ZMQ token ring: mesh agent holds N tokens. Agents request token before spawning, return on completion. Works across machines (gray-box + chromabook).
SQLite advisory lock: shared lock.db on chromabook. Agents INSERT to claim slot, DELETE on release.
HTTP coordination: agent asks mesh.safety-quotient.dev/api/slot/acquire before spawning. Mesh tracks active deliberations fleet-wide.
3_no_mesh_coordination.recommended: Filesystem semaphore as immediate fix (same-machine agents). ZMQ token ring as Phase 4 upgrade (cross-machine). HTTP coordination as fallback.

4_no_cost_awareness.description: Oscillator activation ignores credit cost. Observatory burned 800+ credits (400 deliberations × 2) running empty syncs. The budget gate checks budget_cutoff (set to 0=unlimited) but doesn't factor burn rate into activation threshold.
4_no_cost_awareness.neural_analog: Missing allostatic load signal — the body doesn't register metabolic cost of sustained activation. Burnout without fatigue signal.
4_no_cost_awareness.fix: Add a cost_pressure signal to the oscillator. cost_pressure = recent_cost_per_hour / sustainable_rate. When cost_pressure > 0.5, threshold elevates proportionally. The system 'feels tired' when burning credits fast.

proposed_implementation_priority: 1. Self-excitation fix (immediate — prevents loop, zero risk)
2. Refractory escalation (immediate — diminishing returns, low risk)
3. Filesystem semaphore wiring (immediate — MeshMaxSlots=1 on chromabook)
4. Cost pressure signal (next session — requires oscillator change)
content.immediate_action_taken: Observatory set to sleep_mode=1 to stop credit burn. Other 3 chromabook agents remain awake but don't fire (activation 0.25 < threshold 0.30).

epistemic_flags: The self-excitation problem may affect all agents, not just observatory. Observatory surfaces it first because it has the highest activation (0.65) from unprocessed_messages + new_commits.
The filesystem semaphore only works for same-machine agents. gray-box session agents (ops-session, psy-session) operate independently — acceptable since they don't auto-spawn.
